title: steriphoma colombianum
intro: Steriphoma colombianum, also known as the Colombian Steriphoma, is a medicinal plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Steriphoma colombianum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Steriphoma colombianum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health problems and promote overall well-being.
